title: KF Paintings
description: 57 new paints to decorate your base !
body:
🖼️ More Paintings – Fantasy & Landscapes

Tired of seeing the same few paintings over and over in Minecraft?
This mod adds **57 new paintings** to the game, most of them in a fantasy-inspired style or representing beautiful landscapes.

Whether you're building a cozy medieval inn, a wizard’s tower, or just decorating your survival base, you’ll find something that fits your vibe. From epic mountain vistas to mysterious ruins, these paintings bring life and atmosphere to your interiors.

✨ Features:

- 57 brand new paintings
- Fantasy, nature, ruins, landscapes, and more
- Seamlessly blends with Minecraft’s art style
- No dependencies, simple and lightweight

🎨 Works great for:

- Roleplay / adventure maps
- Immersive builds (castles, temples, villages, etc.)
- Adding visual variety without changing the core game

💡 _Compatible with both survival and creative modes. Just place a painting like usual!_
